title: rubus scabiosus
intro: Rubus scabiosus, also known as the thimbleberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Rubus scabiosus include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus scabiosus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection, which can help to prevent chronic diseases such as cancer and Alzheimer's disease. Rubus scabiosus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal benefits, and its fruit, thimbleberries, are edible and can be used in jams, jellies, and desserts.
